import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Top-level keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)

print\(f'Number of players: {len\(elements\)}'\)
if elements:
    player = elements[0]
    print\('Player fields:'\)
    for k, v in sorted\(player.items\(\)\):
        print\(f'  {k}: {type\(v\).__name__} = {repr\(v\)[:80]}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://fantasy.premierleague.com/api/bootstrap-static/" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
elements = data.get\('elements', []\)

# Find a player with rich data \(premium player with stats\)
# Look for someone with good xG/xA numbers
best = sorted\(elements, key=lambda x: float\(x.get\('expected_goal_involvements', 0\) or 0\), reverse=True\)[:3]
for p in best:
    print\(f\\"=== {p['web_name']} \({p['id']}\) ===\\"\)
    for k in ['form', 'points_per_game', 'selected_by_percent', 'ep_next', 'ep_this',
              'transfers_in_event', 'transfers_out_event', 'cost_change_event',
              'cost_change_start', 'chance_of_playing_next_round', 'chance_of_playing_this_round',
              'minutes', 'starts', 'total_points', 'now_cost', 'value_form', 'value_season',
              'expected_goals', 'expected_assists', 'expected_goal_involvements',
              'expected_goals_per_90', 'expected_assists_per_90', 'expected_goal_involvements_per_90',
              'ict_index', 'influence', 'creativity', 'threat',
              'ict_index_rank', 'form_rank', 'selected_rank',
              'status', 'news', 'bps', 'bonus', 'dreamteam_count',
              'clean_sheets_per_90', 'goals_conceded_per_90',
              'saves_per_90', 'expected_goals_conceded_per_90']:
        print\(f'  {k}: {repr\(p.get\(k\)\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://fantasy.premierleague.com/api/bootstrap-static/" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
elements = data.get\('elements', []\)

# Check element_stats
print\('element_stats:'\)
for s in data.get\('element_stats', []\):
    print\(' ', s\)
print\(\)

# Check game_settings relevant fields
gs = data.get\('game_settings', {}\)
print\('game_settings keys:', list\(gs.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)

# Confirm scout_risks field structure
p_with_risks = [p for p in elements if p.get\('scout_risks'\)]
if p_with_risks:
    print\('Player with scout_risks:', p_with_risks[0]['web_name']\)
    print\('scout_risks:', p_with_risks[0]['scout_risks']\)
else:
    print\('No players have scout_risks populated'\)

# Check if any players have news
p_with_news = [p for p in elements if p.get\('news'\)]
print\(f'Players with news: {len\(p_with_news\)}'\)
if p_with_news:
    for p in p_with_news[:3]:
        print\(f'  {p[\\"web_name\\"]}: {p[\\"news\\"]} | chance_next={p[\\"chance_of_playing_next_round\\"]}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://fantasy.premierleague.com/api/bootstrap-static/" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
elements = data.get\('elements', []\)

# Examine transfers_in/out patterns and cost changes for market signal analysis
import statistics

# Price rise candidates: transfers_in_event >> transfers_out_event
net_transfers = [\(p['web_name'], p['transfers_in_event'] - p['transfers_out_event'], 
                  p['cost_change_event'], p['selected_by_percent'], 
                  p['form'], p['ep_next']\) 
                 for p in elements if p['transfers_in_event'] > 0]
net_transfers.sort\(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True\)
print\('Top net transfers IN this GW:'\)
for name, net, price_change, owned, form, ep_next in net_transfers[:10]:
    print\(f'  {name}: net={net:+,}, price_change={price_change:+}, owned={owned}%, form={form}, ep_next={ep_next}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Biggest price rises this GW:'\)
price_risers = [\(p['web_name'], p['cost_change_event'], p['form'], p['selected_by_percent']\) 
                for p in elements if p['cost_change_event'] > 0]
price_risers.sort\(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True\)
for name, change, form, owned in price_risers[:10]:
    print\(f'  {name}: +{change*0.1:.1f}M, form={form}, owned={owned}%'\)

print\(\)
print\('Biggest price falls this GW:'\)
price_fallers = [\(p['web_name'], p['cost_change_event'], p['form'], p['selected_by_percent']\) 
                 for p in elements if p['cost_change_event'] < 0]
price_fallers.sort\(key=lambda x: x[1]\)
for name, change, form, owned in price_fallers[:10]:
    print\(f'  {name}: {change*0.1:.1f}M, form={form}, owned={owned}%'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://fantasy.premierleague.com/api/bootstrap-static/" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0" | python3 << 'EOF'
import json, sys
data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\)
elements = data.get\('elements', []\)
teams = data.get\('teams', []\)

# Team strength fields
print\('=== Team strength fields ==='\)
for t in sorted\(teams, key=lambda x: x['strength_overall_home'], reverse=True\)[:5]:
    print\(f"  {t['name']}: str_h={t['strength_overall_home']}, str_a={t['strength_overall_away']}, att_h={t['strength_attack_home']}, def_h={t['strength_defence_home']}"\)

# price_change_percent field
print\(\)
print\('=== price_change_percent field ==='\)
has_pct = [p for p in elements if p.get\('price_change_percent'\) and p['price_change_percent'] != '0']
print\(f'Players with non-zero price_change_percent: {len\(has_pct\)}'\)
for p in has_pct[:5]:
    print\(f"  {p['web_name']}: {p['price_change_percent']}%"\)

# Scout risks
all_risks = [p for p in elements if p.get\('scout_risks'\)]
print\(\)
print\(f'=== scout_risks: {len\(all_risks\)} players ==='\)
for p in all_risks[:5]:
    for r in p['scout_risks']:
        print\(f"  {p['web_name']}: {r.get\('property'\)} GW{r.get\('gameweek'\)}"\)

# Type analysis of string-numeric fields
print\(\)
print\('=== Numeric-as-string fields ==='\)
str_fields = ['form','points_per_game','value_form','value_season','ict_index',
              'influence','creativity','threat','expected_goals','expected_assists',
              'expected_goal_involvements','expected_goals_conceded','ep_next','ep_this',
              'selected_by_percent','price_change_percent']
sample = elements[0]
for f in str_fields:
    v = sample.get\(f\)
    print\(f"  {f}: {type\(v\).__name__} = {repr\(v\)}"\)
EOF)
